history.text: A kingdom was proclaimed, placing monarchy at the centre of Madagascar's state authority.
French protectorate placed the territory under outside administration.
French colony placed the territory under outside administration.
A republic was declared, changing Madagascar's political system and state identity.
A declaration of independence was issued, making sovereignty the central political claim.
Referendum appears in Madagascar's historical record.
Socialist state appears in Madagascar's historical record.
Third Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
